papers.title_en: LiT-HiSegFormer-Net: A hybrid SegFormer network with Bi-level context fusion for liver and tumor segmentation in CT images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肝脏及肿瘤在CT图像中的精确分割问题，提出了一种名为LiT-HiSegFormer-Net的混合SegFormer网络。该模型结合了CNN的局部特征提取能力与Transformer的长程建模优势，并通过双层上下文融合机制提升分割精度，为肝细胞癌的临床诊断和放射治疗规划提供了更可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Precise segmentation of the liver and associated tumors is vital for diagnosing andtreatment planning of hepatocellular carcinoma, particularly in radiation therapy.Although U-Net is a CNN-based architecture that has accomplished remarkable …

papers.title_en: Vision-language Models for Structured Report Generation in Radiology: Towards Consistent and Reliable Chest X-ray Reporting
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科医师工作量大及报告一致性不足的问题，探索了利用预训练视觉语言模型（VLMs）自动生成结构化胸部X光报告的方法。通过优化模型以实现更可靠的临床描述，该方法不仅提高了报告生成的效率，还增强了诊断结果的标准化与准确性，为实现自动化、一致且可靠的医疗报告生成提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Medical report generation (MRG) aims to automatically generate reports frommedical images, reducing the workload on radiologists. Research in this field isprogressing rapidly with large pretrained vision-language models (VLMs), but most …

papers.title_en: Leveraging co-attention-based interactions between pathology and radiology for pan-cancer survival prediction
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在通过整合宏观放射影像与微观病理图像来提升泛癌生存预测的准确性。研究提出了一种基于协同注意力机制的深度学习框架，通过捕捉两种模态之间的复杂交互作用，实现了肿瘤特征的多尺度融合。实验结果表明，这种跨模态的交互建模显著优于单一模态或简单的融合方法，为临床肿瘤预后分析提供了一种强有力的多模态计算工具。
papers.abstract_en: Background Integrating macroscopic radiology with microscopic pathology canprovide a multiscale view of tumors, thereby advancing oncology research. However,utilizing the interplay between the two for survival analysis, particularly across …

papers.title_en: Stable or not? unraveling the reliability of radiomic features in 4d-computed tomography in early-stage non-small cell lung cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了4D-CT在早期非小细胞肺癌影像组学中的应用，重点分析了影像组学特征的可靠性。由于4D-CT在放疗规划中虽为金标准但其组学特征稳定性研究不足，作者提出了一套可重复且可扩展的评估流程。研究通过分析不同呼吸时相下的特征表现，识别了稳定的影像组学特征，为提高肺癌放疗精准度和临床预后评估提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Aim Four-dimensional computed tomography (4D-CT) is the gold standard forradiotherapy planning in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), yet its use inradiomics remains underexplored. This study proposes a reproducible, scalable …

papers.title_en: Hierarchical context modeling and prototype-mediated cross-modal alignment for histopathology report generation
papers.tldr: 针对病理全切片图像（WSI）生成临床报告耗时耗力的问题，本文提出了一种层次化上下文建模与原型介导的跨模态对齐框架。该方法通过分层提取WSI的全局与局部特征，并利用原型机制增强视觉与文本特征的对齐，有效提升了病理报告生成的准确性与临床相关性，为自动化病理诊断提供了重要技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Histopathology in whole slide images (WSIs) serves as the gold standard for cancerdiagnosis, with clinical reports playing a critical role in decision-making. However,the time-consuming nature of conventional pathological examination has driven …

papers.title_en: Role of metal artifact reduction software in computed tomography angiography of lower limb metallic prosthesis: A retrospective study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对下肢金属假体在CT检查中产生严重伪影、影响血管造影诊断质量的问题，回顾性评估了单能量金属伪影还原（SEMAR）算法的临床表现。研究发现，SEMAR技术能显著抑制金属伪影，提升血管结构的显示清晰度及图像质量，为装有金属假体患者的下肢血管评估提供了更可靠的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: BACKGROUND Metal artifacts significantly limit the diagnostic quality of computedtomography (CT) algorithm in patients with lower limb metallic prostheses. Single-energy metal artifact reduction (SEMAR) algorithms have been developed to address …

papers.title_en: Cooperative Multiplex GNN for High-Grade Glioma Survival Prediction from Preoperative Multi-Modal Radiomics-Based Brain Networks
papers.tldr: 本研究针对高级别胶质瘤（HGG）术前生存预测的难题，提出了一种协作多层图神经网络（Cooperative Multiplex GNN）。该方法利用多模态MRI影像组学构建脑结构与功能连接网络，通过图学习技术捕捉复杂的脑网络特征。研究证明，该模型能有效整合多源信息，显著提升了生存期预测的精度，为临床制定个性化治疗方案提供了重要的参考依据。
papers.abstract_en: Accurately and preoperatively predicting survival for high-grade gliomas (HGGs) isimportant for optimizing treatment strategies. Increasing evidence suggests that brainstructural and functional connectivity networks derived from advanced magnetic …

papers.title_en: MRI-Based Radiomics to Predict Response to Neoadjuvant Therapy in Locally Advanced Rectal Cancer: A Retrospective Study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对局部晚期直肠癌（LARC）新辅助治疗反应的异质性，旨在通过基于MRI的影像组学方法早期识别非响应者。研究回顾性分析了患者的MRI影像特征并构建预测模型，以期优化治疗方案并减少不必要的毒副作用，为临床个性化治疗提供了重要的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Response to neoadjuvant therapy in locally advanced rectal cancer(LARC) is heterogeneous and early identification of non-responders may helpoptimize treatment strategies and reduce unnecessary toxicity. This study aimed to …

papers.title_en: Fine-Tuned Segment Anything Model with Low-Rank Adaptation for Chest X-Ray Images
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了利用低秩自适应（LoRA）技术对Segment Anything Model（SAM）进行微调，以优化其在胸部X射线（CXR）图像分割中的表现。针对通用大模型在医学影像领域精度不足的挑战，研究通过参数高效的微调方法，显著提升了模型对复杂解剖结构的识别能力，为医疗影像自动化分析提供了高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Background: This paper investigates the use of the Segment Anything Model (SAM)for chest X-ray (CXR) image segmentation, with a focus on improving its performanceusing low-rank adaptation (LoRA). Methods: We evaluate three versions of SAM: two …

papers.title_en: Large Language Model‐Driven Analysis and Report Generation of Endoscopy Videos—A Pilot Study
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在胃镜（EGD）视频自动化分析及报告生成中的应用。通过对完整内镜视频的处理，研究评估了MLLM识别临床特征的能力，并重点分析了计算机辅助检测（CAD）覆盖层对模型输出的影响。作为一项初步研究，它证明了MLLM在提升内镜诊断效率方面的潜力，为未来开发智能临床辅助系统提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can automatically analyze clinicalvideo, but evidence from full esophagogastroduodenoscopy (EGD) and the impact ofon‐screen computer‐aided detection/diagnosis (CAD) overlays on MLLM behavior …

papers.title_en: MR Radiomics Combined With Radiologic Features to Predict Recurrence Location in Nonviable Hepatocellular Carcinoma After Transarterial Chemoembolization
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在解决肝细胞癌（HCC）患者在接受TACE治疗并达到影像学无活性后，早期复发位置难以预测的问题。研究通过整合增强MRI的影像组学特征与传统放射学特征，开发并验证了一个预测模型。该模型能够有效识别复发风险较高的区域，为临床医生制定个性化随访和干预策略提供了重要参考，有助于提高患者的预后管理水平。
papers.abstract_en: Objective To develop a predictive model that integrates radiomics features fromcontrast‐enhanced MRI with conventional radiologic features to identify earlyrecurrence locations in nonviable hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) after transarterial …

papers.title_en: U-Net-based transfer learning for automated tumour segmentation enabling fully automated [18F] F-DOPA PET analysis in paediatric gliomas
papers.tldr: 本研究针对儿童胶质瘤 [18F] F-DOPA PET 影像分析中手动分割耗时且存在主观差异的问题，提出了一种基于 U-Net 的迁移学习自动化肿瘤分割方法。通过利用预训练模型并进行微调，该方法实现了全自动化的肿瘤参数提取。研究结果表明，该自动化流程在提高效率的同时，保持了与专家手动分割高度的一致性，为临床评估儿童胶质瘤提供了可靠的自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Background PET imaging with [18F] F-DOPA shows great promise for assessingpaediatric gliomas. Manual tumour delineation and parameter extraction are time-consuming and prone to inter-operator variability. Methods We evaluated whether a …

papers.title_en: The MAMA-MIA Challenge: Advancing Generalizability and Fairness in Breast MRI Tumor Segmentation and Treatment Response Prediction
papers.tldr: 本研究介绍了MAMA-MIA挑战赛，旨在提升乳腺癌MRI肿瘤分割及治疗反应预测模型的泛化性与公平性。针对乳腺癌这一全球女性高发恶性肿瘤，该挑战赛通过提供多样化数据集，评估AI算法在不同人群和临床环境下的表现，致力于解决现有模型在实际应用中存在的偏差和鲁棒性不足问题，推动更公平、高效的临床诊断工具开发。
papers.abstract_en: Breast cancer is the most frequently diagnosed malignancy among womenworldwide and a leading cause of cancer-related mortality. Dynamic contrast-enhanced magnetic resonance imaging plays a central role in tumor characterization …

papers.title_en: ProFound: A moderate-sized vision foundation model for multi-task prostate imaging
papers.tldr: 本研究针对前列腺癌多参数MRI诊断中专家解读难以规模化的问题，提出了ProFound，一个中等规模的视觉基础模型。该模型旨在通过在大规模前列腺影像数据上进行预训练，实现对多种临床任务的自动化处理。ProFound在保持模型规模适中的同时，显著提升了多任务处理的泛化能力和准确性，为前列腺癌的精准诊疗提供了高效的自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Many diagnostic and therapeutic clinical tasks for prostate cancer increasingly relyon multi-parametric MRI. Automating these tasks is challenging because theynecessitate expert interpretations, which are difficult to scale to capitalise on modern …

papers.title_en: Clinically Aware Synthetic Image Generation for Concept Coverage in Chest X-ray Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对公共胸部X射线数据集在疾病概念覆盖上的不足，提出了一种临床感知的合成图像生成框架。该方法通过生成具有特定临床特征的合成数据，增强了AI诊断模型对多样化疾病表现的识别能力。实验表明，这种方法能有效提升模型在复杂临床环境下的鲁棒性，为解决医疗AI数据长尾分布和概念缺失问题提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: The clinical deployment of AI diagnostic models demands more than benchmarkaccuracy-it demands robustness across the full spectrum of disease presentations.However, publicly available chest radiographic datasets systematically …

papers.title_en: DiffVP: Differential Visual Semantic Prompting for LLM-Based CT Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对基于大语言模型的CT报告生成中，传统方法无法区分关键病变与冗余解剖背景的问题，提出了DiffVP（差异化视觉语义提示）方法。该方法受放射科医生认知过程启发，通过差异化提示增强模型对关键信息的捕捉能力，显著提升了报告生成的准确性与临床相关性，为自动化放射学报告生成提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models (LLMs) have advanced CT report generation, existingmethods typically encode 3D volumes holistically, failing to distinguish informativecues from redundant anatomical background. Inspired by radiological cognitive …

papers.title_en: CoRe: Joint Optimization with Contrastive Learning for Medical Image Registration
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学图像配准中强度不一致和非线性形变的难题，提出了CoRe框架。该方法通过将对比学习与配准任务进行联合优化，显著提升了模型在不同模态和时间点图像间的特征对齐能力。实验证明，CoRe在处理复杂组织形变时具有更高的精度和鲁棒性，为医学影像分析提供了有效的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Medical image registration is a fundamental task in medical image analysis, enablingthe alignment of images from different modalities or time points. However, intensityinconsistencies and nonlinear tissue deformations pose significant challenges to the …
